---
title: "Notes"
subtitle: "Miscellaneous notes, ideas, and how-tos"
description-meta: "Notes, coming soon."
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
---

::: {style="text-align:center; padding: 3rem 1rem;"}

<i class="fa-regular fa-note-sticky" style="font-size:3rem; color:#05336B;"></i>

## Coming soon

A space for miscellaneous notes, ideas, and step-by-step how-tos. Content is on the way.

[← Back to home](index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary role="button"}

:::
